title: Fix failing security/snyk check on PR #159

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating failing security/snyk status on PR #159 (target develop). Local Snyk integration exists via kbs snyk pull but cannot fetch finding details without SNYK_TOKEN. Branch currently pins langchain-core=0.3.81; proceeding with dependency bump to 0.3.84+ and lock refresh to match Snyk fix direction.
